title: Militech
description: An Oritech re-texture to move from its space-age look to something more 20XX.
body:
**Militech** is a re-texture for the fantastic **[Oritech](https://modrinth.com/mod/oritech)** mod.

It moves the mod's visuals from it's novel Space-Age aesthetic to a more 20XX aesthetic that would fit well into any laboratory. It doesn't touch sound, animations, or anything else. JUST the textures.

![Isorender of multiple retextured Oritech machines](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9ca2652f85c74fcbc7ea72ac17e9400ffa49a79.png)
